category_sources: source_facts.description says fileicon is a macOS CLI for managing custom icons for files and folders.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for fileicon.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/mklement0/fileicon, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes managing custom icons for macOS files and folders.
source_facts.executables lists the fileicon CLI executable.
